system.flavor: Your words bite into your foe's resolve, weakening their strikes.
system.effect:
Attack: 1 piercing damage. Hit: +1d3 piercing damage
On hit your foe. Your marked foe has attack [-] and takes 2d3 piercing damage if they miss an attack. A foe can save at the end of their turn to remove this mark.
Weave this ability resolves, increase a negative status on a foe in range 2-5 by +1.
